do_not_change_yet: Do not change bot config, gates, routes, scores, orders, or promotion status.
Do not blend experiment or research-note evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not promote Mustard X from pending candidates, ghost expectancy, or options context alone.
Do not use the missing mustard_forward source as positive or negative expectancy evidence.
key_findings: Daily certification is REJECTED; AI learning and promotion evidence cannot affect bot or normal scores.
Mustard forward source for 2026-07-05 is missing, while the embedded rollup shows 40 candidates, 0 entered, 0 graded, and 40 pending.
Gap/options agreement is mostly context: 41 symbols, only 9 fully checked, 6 clear agreements, 3 mixed/weak, 31 options-only not fully checked, 32 gaps missing, and 0 actual trades/fills.
Panel expectancy is ghost-heavy with 80142 ghost fires, 79809 ghost graded, 34878 ghost runners, and 0 actual trades or closed PnL.
Promotion gate blocks all visible candidates as BLOCK_REJECTED_DAY; Mustard Runner has high ghost edge but 0 actual trades.
money_risks: Hypothesized edge is not yet money-relevant because actual trades, actual fills, and realized PnL are zero for reviewed panels.
Mustard context can become decorative overfit unless parent lineage, clear-highway labels, and options agreement prove incremental forward R.
Incomplete gap/options coverage can create false confidence.
Mustard Grind edge appears very small in ghost evidence unless costs, turnover, and slippage still leave positive expectancy.
open_questions: Why is _DAILY/fem_mustard_forward_score_2026-07-05.json missing while embedded Mustard data exists?
Why does the Mustard rollup show 40 candidates while the packet exposes only 12 detailed candidate rows?
Do clear gap/options agreements outperform gap-only or conflict rows after 20 to 30 clean shadow samples?
Do Mustard fresh/deep-stack candidates retain positive closed R after realistic exits rather than only favorable excursion?
priority_actions: Advisory only: convert the six seed hypotheses into admitted shadow specs before any scoring interpretation.
Shadow-test Mustard fresh deep-stack grind and options/gap clear-highway agreement first because they map directly to claimed edge and have explicit kill criteria.
Track whether clear gap/options rows outperform conflict and gaps-missing rows over clean forward samples.
Require actual or paper closed outcomes before treating panel expectancy as money-relevant.

do_not_change_yet: Do not promote panels or blend experiment evidence into normal scoring while certification is REJECTED.

Do not infer stop/target quality from pending, ungraded Mustard forward rows.
key_findings: Broker reconcile is clean: broker connected, 0 open orders, 0 positions, 0 unprotected positions, and 0 orphan exit orders.
Daily certification is REJECTED; promotion gate blocks all 25 strategies, with 0 forward order breaches and 0 normal partition leaks.
Actual execution evidence is thin: gap/options actual_trades=0, actual_fills=0; Mustard forward entered=0, graded=0, pending_entry=40.
Main execution risk is stale or uncertified data: health is FAIL and gate_effectiveness contains 229 STALE_FIRE hits.

Permission telemetry still deserves review because route_lock_enforce and gate_router_enforce are true, while legacy trade permission enforcement is reported false and legacy MOO is active in the daily launcher.
Giveback is WATCHING and allowed new entries; blocked_candidates=0, saved_loss_r=0, missed_profit_r=0.
money_risks: Stale-fire risk can convert old theory into bad live timing.
Research-to-live leakage risk is elevated because strong-looking ghost/pending data exists while certification blocks live use.
Sizing geometry risk exists in high risk-per-share theoretical rows, especially when options/gap agreement conflicts.
Execution slippage/fill behavior is unproven because panel score has no actual closed trades.

key_findings: Gap/options coverage is thin: 41 traces, only 9 fully checked; 32 gaps_missing, 1 options_missing, and 0 actual trades/fills.
Agreement summary shows 6 GAPS_AND_OPTIONS_AGREE_CLEAR, 3 MIXED_OR_WEAK_AGREEMENT, 31 OPTIONS_ONLY_NOT_FULLY_CHECKED, and 1 NO_MAPS.
Mustard forward summary has 40 pending candidates, 0 entered, 0 graded, avg_max_favorable_r -0.0005, and no realized expectancy evidence.
Detailed candidate shelf contains 12 visible objects: 1 AGREE, 5 CONFLICT, and 6 GAPS MISSING.
The only detailed AGREE is CRNX; it looks more fixed-target friendly than runner-clear because options_long_read is mixed and the call wall appears before 2R.
Conflict names ALKT, TRU, OC, PCVX, and CMPS all show call_wall_before_target=true and call_wall_before_2r=true.
No explicit channel/location fields are present in the detailed Mustard candidate schema, so channel evidence remains seed-hypothesis level.
money_risks: False confidence from 31 options-only traces could overstate agreement.
Call walls before target/2R in conflict names create upside capture risk for longs.
Missing parent shelves on 6 detailed names prevents real gap/highway validation.
Daily certification is REJECTED, so any promotion-like interpretation conflicts with packet safety state.

llm_call.synthesis: {'summary': 'Keep the live LLM call research-only. The packet itself was regenerated on 2026-07-05, but the decisive contract spine is rejected and multiple proof sources are stale or missing. Broker state is clean and route locks look protective, yet there is no fresh actual-trade, fill, or realized-R evidence for Mustard X or gap/options agreement. The useful work is evidence hygiene plus admitted shadow tests, not promotion or live behavior change.', 'evidence_state': ['AI learning: WARN, 6 high-priority seed hypotheses, all DEFINE_SHADOW_TEST / RESEARCH_NOTE, can_affect_bot=false, can_affect_scores=false.', 'Daily certification: FAIL / REJECTED with operator read citing critical registry/score/order contract breaches.', 'Contract health: FAIL from stale proof ledgers.', 'Broker reconcile: OK with no open orders, positions, or unprotected positions.', 'Live gate conformance: WARN with 0 orders checked and 0 fills checked.', 'Promotion gate: FAIL / REJECTED; all 25 strategies blocked and certification does not allow promotion.', 'Mustard forward: 40 pending candidates, 0 entered, 0 graded, no realized R; 2026-07-05 daily source file is missing.', 'Gap/options: 41 traces, 9 fully checked, 6 clear agreements, 32 gaps missing, 0 actual trades/fills.', 'Panel score: ghost-heavy, actual_trades=0 and actual_closed=0.'], 'stale_or_missing_sources': ['daily_certification source modified 2026-07-01T18:20:27+00:00 and was about 92.5 hours old at packet generation.', 'promotion_gate source modified 2026-07-01T18:20:27+00:00 and was about 92.5 hours old at packet generation.', 'gate_effectiveness source modified 2026-07-01T13:47:47+00:00 and was about 97.0 hours old at packet generation.', 'giveback source modified 2026-07-01T17:14:02+00:00 and was about 93.6 hours old at packet generation.', 'gap_options source modified 2026-07-03T11:58:10+00:00 and was about 50.8 hours old at packet generation.', 'health source modified 2026-07-03T12:05:07+00:00 and was about 50.7 hours old at packet generation.', 'mustard_forward source is missing: C:\\Users\\Gill\\Desktop\\FEM_TOOLS\\_DAILY\\fem_mustard_forward_score_2026-07-05.json.', 'Health snapshot reports stale dashboard, breaks, accountability, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, ghost ledger, decision obligation, live-fire accounting, session context, score provenance, and score partitions.', 'Mustard forward rollup count and detailed candidate rows do not reconcile in the packet view: 40 summary candidates versus 12 visible detailed candidate objects.']}
